steps.title: Focus on the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Artemia franciscana and Nodularia. The notes say both organisms live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.

steps.title: Reject single-subject choices
steps.content: Choice B mentions only Nodularia. Choice C describes the lake rather than a similarity between the organisms. Choice D mentions only Artemia franciscana. The answer is A.
